title: Matera announces the hiring of Patrick Devlin as president of United States
excerpt: Executive Channel shares the news regarding the appointment of Patrick Devlin to lead Matera's U.S. operations.
body: Executive Channel shares the news regarding the appointment of Patrick Devlin to lead Matera's U.S. operations. [Read here.](https://canalexecutivoblog.wordpress.com/2022/07/20/matera-anuncia-a-contratacao-de-patrick-devlin-como-presidente-nos-estados-unidos/)
